description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a slanted front panel that appears to function as a drop-down door or lid. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving it a natural, unfinished look, and the box is constructed with clean, straight edges and precise joinery. A small, rounded wooden handle is attached to the upper part of the slanted front, suggesting easy access to the interior. The top, sides, and back are solid panels, while the front panel is likely hinged at the bottom for opening. The box is robust and utilitarian, suitable for storing tools, documents, or miscellaneous items in an urban environment. Its size and design make it ideal for placement on the floor of a garage, workshop, or storage room.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden storage box with a slanted, drop-down front panel and a small wooden handle. The natural wood finish and solid construction make it suitable for urban storage needs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slanted drop-down panel with a small handle at the top center.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled front panel and the protruding handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, flat wooden back with no openings or handles.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the angled front and handle.
attribute_handle_design: single small wooden handle on front panel
